notes: Two cash-balance fixes (schema v10). BUILD 1 — Removed the month-end auto-sweep feature. It auto-created Salary→Savings 'sweep' transfers and permanently mutated opening balances, inflating reported savings by the salary-account residue (which users often intentionally keep, e.g. a credit-card reserve). v10 migration reverses every existing auto-sweep (restores salary opening, removes from savings, deletes the sweep txns, clears lastAutoSweepThrough). runMonthEndAutoSweep() is now a no-op and no longer called on launch. Result: end-of-May savings now equals the true balance (was inflated by ₹73,271 in the test data). BUILD 2 — Current-month 'Savings (end of month)' row now uses the same clean formula as future months: start-of-month savings + (surplus − scheduled investments), savings-account only. Previously the current month used a consolidated sav+sal−CC liquidity figure that mixed accounts and diverged from every other month. Now the savings projection row is consistent across past/current/future. The Account Balances (start-of-month) row still shows true live savings/salary/CC for the current month.
